channel.title: Add new post in WP dashboard, but they do not appear on the zeit hosted site
channel.description: Is this right? I need to rebuild each time I make a post in WordPress?

item.title: Add new post in WP dashboard, but they do not appear on the zeit hosted site
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hello @ihatespam and welcome to our community

New Posts should appear automatically on your React frontend, no need to rebuild everytime. Can you share with us your zeit hosted site and your WordPress site so we can take a look at it?

Read full topic
item.source: Add new post in WP dashboard, but they do not appear on the zeit hosted site

item.title: Add new post in WP dashboard, but they do not appear on the zeit hosted site
